reviews.review_description: It’s a fun thing. I just wish they did multiplayer and a real game.

It’s a great game just needs some work for starters it’s super sensitive and makes it hard to play hard to hold the stick and when on defense the person you defend your stick will go right through them I love the concept it just needs some fixes
The games great overall, but you need to at sleeves on the jerseys, and some shine on the helmets, but the games great but this will make it greater!
It’s a good game but they should add a lsm (long stick midfielder) game mode

Sucks can't play against other people js a
 practice

developer_response.body: Yes, this is a free game where you can play skills contests. If you want full games you need to buy the full version, LAX VR.  Sorry bro

reviews.review_description: The game is great but they should make graphics better and also and an online mode to play live with other people and add attack men long poles.
It’s a good game but completely different then the actual sport in my opinion as some of the movements in the game are not particularly compared to the sport and in the gameplay

reviews.review_title: Good but can’t turn off my turning
reviews.review_description: The game is great just got it today and I’m hooked but I have driftstick on my left controller so I swap the thump sticks and I can’t stop turning even after turning off the thump stick turning (please fix)

This is the free version of the full featured LAX VR game.  The full version, includes Bravehearts, 6 v 6 and Box.  You can find the full version by searching for "LAX VR" or on the laxvr website.  This version was provided for free to the lacrosse community by Duper Studios with hopes you might support the paid game, which supports further development.  Enjoy!
Only been playing for a day and I already love. It is so fun to practice and compete with others.
